title: Release Engineer
description: Join Supabase's DevOps team to build reliable release and deployment processes supporting our developer-first platform.
responsibilities: Design and implement CI/CD pipelines and automation
Manage release processes and coordinate deployments
Monitor deployment health and troubleshoot issues
Document release procedures and best practices
Support developers with deployment tooling and guidance

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Competitive salary with annual equity grants
Flexible time off and work arrangements
